name: Transformation RPG
description:
You're on a chamber willing, ready to be transformed magically. If you want or not, you can make it as sexually explicit as you want.

What do you want to transform into?

-----------

My first public bot. I didn't find any actual interesting bot with similar premise so I made it myself.

Please share your chats, and give your review.

And maybe, if you want, give me ideas of what I could do to either this bot or new potential ones, who knows?
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
